Carbon_Chest.description: High strength, lightweight graphene nano-lattice armor from Norex.
Carbon_Chest.flavorText: Two hundred times stronger than steel and extraordinarily conductive, the IO suit\'s graphene weave allows it to dissipate energy with near-perfect efficiency.

Carbon_Arms.description: High strength, lightweight graphene nano-lattice armor from Norex.
Carbon_Arms.flavorText: Focused on energy absorbance rather than outright hardness, the material\'s graphene multi-layered construction bleeds impact energy away almost instantly.

Carbon_Legs.description: High strength, lightweight graphene nano-lattice armor from Norex.
Carbon_Legs.flavorText: A product of zero-g manufacturing techniques, this semi-rigid mid-weight graphene protextile is renowned for protecting against micro-meteorites travelling at upward of 10km/sec.

Carbon_Feet.description: High strength, lightweight graphene nano-lattice armor from Norex.
Carbon_Feet.flavorText: Norex is a \'grey\' research venture between \'old world\' ACS companies Norsec and mining giant ExMin.

Carbon_Head.description: High strength, lightweight graphene nano-lattice armor from Norex.
Carbon_Head.flavorText: A high-tech balance of physical protection, lightweight nano-construction, energy absorbance and protection against extremes of temperature.

Feet_Body_Legs_Attachment_Stealth_Moveme.description: An attachment that reduces the threat while stealth and improves crouched movement speed.
Feet_Body_Legs_Attachment_Stealth_Moveme.flavorText: Can be equipped to feet, chest or legs armor at an Alteration Bench.

Body_Attachment_Stomach_Capacity.description: An attachment that allows an extra active food buff and increases the duration of food buffs.
Body_Attachment_Stomach_Capacity.flavorText: Can be equipped to Chest armor at an Alteration Bench.

Ranged_Weapon_Attachment_Decreased_Sprea.description: An attachment that reduces the spread of your shots.
Ranged_Weapon_Attachment_Decreased_Sprea.flavorText: Can be attached to a valid shotgun.

Fish_08.description: An uncommon freshwater fish. Can be filleted at a Fishing Bench.
Fish_08.flavorText: You caught this, with a rod or a trap. Right Click to convert this to Fish Chunks.

Fish_11_Var2.description: A rare saltwater fish. Can be filleted at a Fishing Bench.
Fish_11_Var2.flavorText: You caught this, with a rod or a trap. Right Click to convert this to Fish Chunks.

Fish_13_Var3.description: A rare saltwater fish. Can be filleted at a Fishing Bench.
Fish_13_Var3.flavorText: You caught this, with a rod or a trap. Right Click to convert this to Fish Chunks.

Fish_18_Var2.description: An uncommon, saltwater fish. Can be filleted at a Fishing Bench.
Fish_18_Var2.flavorText: You caught this, with a rod or a trap. Right Click to convert this to Fish Chunks.

Pyritic_Crust_Iron.description: A heavily scarred stone with traces of metal and minerals. Use the Organic Residue Cleanser to gain Iron Ore. Toxic to humans, this will damage you when carried.
Pyritic_Crust_Iron.flavorText: The UDA has issued an Icarus-wide health warning regarding this material. Use at your own risk.

Raw_Wood_Sign_Trunk_A.description: A charming sign to display information on.

Needler_Head.description: A preserved memory of a once-great Needler.
Needler_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Needler_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Great_Hunt_Device.description: A Communications Device Provided by Norex to Track down Apex Creatures in the World.
Great_Hunt_Device.flavorText: The Norex Operations Verification Assembly - Your one stop shop for everything black market.

Meta_Biolab_Inhaler_Hammerhead.description: An inhaler that delivers a concentrated dose of UDA-approved chemicals, assists with gathering ore.
Meta_Biolab_Inhaler_Hammerhead.flavorText: Ah, the wonders of modern medicine.

Meta_Biolab_Inhaler_SwampApe.description: An inhaler that delivers a concentrated dose of UDA-approved chemicals which may assist gathering infected bark.
Meta_Biolab_Inhaler_SwampApe.flavorText: Ah, the wonders of modern medicine.
